response:
Hi there,  

I just remembered that I should have included you in yesterday's call with business stakeholders. I've included the meeting notes for you. As a Business Analyst and UI/UX developer, you will be involved in this project. Please get in touch with Shannon on the next steps and your involvement in the project.  

I am Zinnira. How should I reply to this email?  

**Reply:**  
Thank you for the reminder. I’m happy to be involved in this project and will follow up with Shannon regarding the next steps. Let me know if you need any further information.  

Best regards,  
Zinnira
